{{Infobox event
|name=The Duchess becomes obsessed with finding moral lessons in everything, testing Alice's patience
|participants=Alice, Duchess
|chapitre=9
}}

== Course of events ==

The Duchess becomes fixated on discovering moral lessons in everything, channeling this obsession into her interactions with Alice. Her relentless pursuit of ethical principles in each moment serves as a persistent test of Alice's patience, as the Duchess demands that lessons be extracted from all situations and experiences they encounter together.

Alice must navigate this dynamic where the Duchess's preoccupation with finding moral instruction shapes their engagement. The intensity of the Duchess's quest to impose lessons on everything around her creates an ongoing challenge to Alice's equanimity and forbearance.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
